insight: SpawnRuleRandomPeriod gives each online player ONE random XZ roll per tick within Block_Radius; if it fails Height, biome whitelist, world/region chance, or a GriefPrevention claim, that player waits the full Delay with no retry (looks like 'boss only spawns for some players'). The loop does NOT short-circuit after first spawn. Mitigate by whitelisting neighbor biomes at 100%, widening Height to cover Y=128 nether-roof landings, or raising Spawning.Randomize_Location_Attempts (default 4).
